creator: thepish@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: suspended->closed

Emacs mode was already documented. Added a see also from -E to set -o emacs 
for clarity. Arithmetic format was also documented for $(( )) but not for 
let (and exp for that matter). Added these. Re meaning of unimplemented, 
it means what it says - unimplemented in FreeBSD.
